name: Absent
definition: No accepted artifact or feature surface exists

name: Documented / planned
definition: Scope, owner, root authority, risks and first contract documented
demotion_trigger: DT-L1-001 scope contract loses mandatory field

name: Fixture prototype
definition: Fixture-backed UI/API contract exists; no backend mutation
demotion_trigger: DT-L2-001 fixture parse fail; DT-L2-002 74-fixtures.js loaded by portal SEV-1; DT-L2-003 forbidden file modified SEV-1

name: Current-portal-safe E2E prototype
definition: Feature-flagged HMV4 surface passes E2E and no forbidden diff
demotion_trigger: DT-L3-001 chromium baseline FAIL → BLOCK_NEXT; DT-L3-002 a11y serious violation; DT-L3-003 rollback runbook stale > 90d

name: Opt-in live read-only API
definition: Contracted live read API available with safe fallback
demotion_trigger: DT-L4-001 silent fallback to fixture detected SEV-1; DT-L4-002 contract drift > 30d; DT-L4-003 error_rate > 1% over 7d

name: Controlled mutation
definition: Command, workflow, audit, event, evidence, idempotency and rollback path implemented
acceptance: ART-L5-001..007 + T-L5-001..011; per-mutation ADR + user approval phrase
demotion_trigger: DT-L5-001 RULE-2 banned-decision attempt SEV-0; DT-L5-002 audit chain break SEV-1; DT-L5-003 tenant boundary leak SEV-1; DT-L5-004 saga compensation failure SEV-2

name: Pre-production validation package
definition: Risk-based validation package complete for intended use
demotion_trigger: DT-L6-001 validation evidence stale > 365d; DT-L6-002 RTM coverage < 1.00; DT-L6-003 DR drill fail 2 consecutive quarters

name: Multi-site / verticalized / productized
definition: Packaged for sites, roles, verticals, onboarding and commercial operation
demotion_trigger: DT-L7-001 SLA breach material; DT-L7-002 customer audit failure; DT-L7-003 multi-tenancy boundary leak SEV-0
